_comment: Per-agent DISPLAY NAME + AVATAR config (V2 #48). HOT-RELOADING: the server reads this live on each profile request (no restart, not baked into code) — edit a name or avatar filename here and it takes effect immediately, unless a user has set their own via the profile editor (a user override always wins). Avatars are filenames under promptgym/avatars/. Re-theme freely (Smiths/Djinni/...) by editing this file + each persona's promptgym/<type>/CLAUDE.md voice.
